title: FinanceOS
description: Tracking my finances in Excel was completely manual, every transaction logged by hand. I built a full-stack app to automate it, with real bank sync, smart alerts, and a debt payoff simulator.
features: Debt payoff simulator with Waterfall and Snowball strategies
CSV/XLSX bulk import from real bank statement downloads
Rule-based alert engine that evaluates over-budget and spending spike conditions on every transaction write

logs.event: Backend API and database schema completed
DB migration frontend and backend connection
Telegram bot & PWA push feature completed
